author: lOrm
content: Implemented ToolHandler trait + ToolRegistry in src/tools/registry.rs (473 LOC). Replaced the 50-arm match in execute_tool_with_memory and the 4-arm task dispatch in execute_tool_with_tasks with registry().dispatch(). mod.rs: -116/+46 lines net. 29 ToolHandler impls. All 172 integration tests pass (33 bash + 8 file + 131 integration). cargo build clean. No #[allow(...)], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. rustfmt applied to both files.
